name: Rattan Kids' Bedside Table Coral - Pillowfort™: Pink Rattan Nightstand, No Assembly, Ethical Handcraft Certified
description: Transition the look of your kiddo's room with the functional charm of this Rattan Bedside Table from Pillowfort™. Designed in a cylindrical shape that fits neatly alongside their bed, this space-saving bedside table features a textured tabletop and loop-like rattan designs around the sides for added natural charm and textured appeal. Striking a clean-lined silhouette, the bedside table blends effortlessly with any decor style and color palette.
